article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in 174 non-market rental units at 6th Street under permanent housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14758 on August 26, 2025, authorizing a formal housing agreement with Metro Vancouver Housing Corporation for a 174-unit affordable rental building at 7786 and 7792 6th Street. The agreement is registered on the property title (a legal note attached to the land record), meaning the affordability rules — including rent limits and tenant income caps — are permanently tied to the property.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025
